title: La Música y los Instrumentos
description: Children discover different musical instruments and form a band together
learningObjectives: Identify common musical instruments in Spanish
Use the verb 'tocar' (to play) with different instruments
Understand musical concepts: listening, singing, playing together
culturalNotes: Maracas are traditional Latin American percussion instruments, highlighting cultural authenticity in the vocabulary selection.

seo.metaTitle: La Música y los Instrumentos - Free Spanish Book for Kids | Beibei Amigos
seo.metaDescription: Interactive Spanish book teaching preschoolers about musical instruments. Learn guitarra, tambor, flauta, piano, and maracas with pronunciation guides. Free educational resource for ages 2-5.

author: Luna 📚 - Beibei Amigos
